name: Thai Spring Rolls
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces tempura powder, mixed with water
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage, carrots, and celery.
2. In a large wok over low heat, cook the shredded vegetables until the cabbage begins to soften. Add the minced chicken breast, sliced mushrooms, oyster sauce, salt, and black pepper. Toss well until all ingredients are evenly coated.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely in the refrigerator for 2 hours or until it is safe to touch.
4. To assemble the spring rolls:
a. Place about 2 ounces of the filling on one corner end of a spring roll packet.
b. Fold the bottom forward and over the top, rolling tightly.
c. Tuck the sides in while continuing to roll forward.
d. Seal the roll by placing a dab of tempura mix on the tip of the skin and rolling it over.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a deep pan or pot to 350°F (175°C).
6. Fry the spring rolls in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Serve with your favorite sauces.
